title: agrostis linkii
intro: Agrostis linkii, also known as Link's bent grass or bent grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis linkii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. In herbal preparations, Agrostis linkii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
